blockingIssues.description: Unresolved from prior scrutiny round: drizzle/meta/0003_snapshot.json still omits public.metric_baselines, public.user_annotations, and public.dismissed_insights introduced by drizzle/0003_dashboard-tables.sql, leaving migration metadata drift risk for future db:generate runs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit evidence in handoff skillFeedback when claiming followedProcedure=true for TDD/test-first tasks, and mark false when implementation precedes failing-test creation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix feature reviews (fix-baseline-source-resolution, fix-meal-annotation-mapping) observed code edits before new tests while handoffs still reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine the mission rule 'Do NOT modify existing test files' to allow required test updates for fix features and regression coverage tasks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-meal-annotation-mapping explicitly required test updates in features.json, creating a direct conflict with AGENTS guidance.
